name: Speed Jump Rope with Counter
description: Adjustable steel cable speed jump rope with digital rep counter, ball-bearing handles, and memory foam grips.

reviews.title: Great training rope at a low price
reviews.reviewText: Fast, smooth, and the counter is a genuinely useful feature for tracking reps. The ball bearings make a noticeable difference for speed work. Very comfortable foam handles. Excellent value.

reviews.title: Best jump rope I have used
reviews.reviewText: The speed and smoothness of this rope is impressive for the price. The digital counter helps track sets easily. The length adjustment is straightforward and it does not tangle.

reviews.title: Good quality training rope
reviews.reviewText: Solid rope that spins smoothly. The counter is handy though it occasionally misses a rep in double-under attempts. For regular single-under cardio training it is perfect.
